sections.paragraph:
Original: קצץ

Transliteration: qâtsats

Phonetic: kaw-tsats'

BDB Definition:

  1. to cut off
    1. (Qal) to cut off
    2. (Piel) to cut or hew off, cut in two, cut in pieces
    3. (Pual) to be cut or hewn off

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2060

Part(s) of speech: Verb
